subject: Open5GS transport + 5G contract hardening
body: SimulatedUPF and mock transport contract tests already pass. Your job: harden Open5GSUPFProvider real transport path and strengthen adapter contracts. Files in your scope: edge/5g/, integration/, test/. Key rule: do NOT mark live Open5GS as VERIFIED unless real HTTP session runs against UERANSIM or Open5GS. Add dry-run-capable real transport scaffold. After work, append to .agent-coord/log.jsonl and drop summary in .agent-coord/inbox/claude.jsonl.
reference_file: docs/v1.1/VERIFICATION-MATRIX.md (rows: Open5GS Integration, eBPF QoS Enforcement — both NOT VERIFIED)

subject: mode-aware-dispatch
body: Use session_start/next_task with --mode verification for the current 5G tranche. Roadmap queue now carries task mode tags and next_task filters on them.
